case_title: JOHANNA GROSSMAN VS. JOAN HUALLEY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-17-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUALLEY, JOAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.
